recommendations.title: Landmine Goes Click
recommendations.overview: After an American tourist steps on a landmine, he is forced to watch his girlfriend get assaulted.

recommendations.title: Offender
recommendations.overview: Justice needs to be served at Britain's most notorious young offenders institute.

recommendations.title: The Lost King
recommendations.overview: An amateur historian defies the academic establishment in her efforts to find King Richard III's remains, which were lost for over 500 years.

recommendations.title: Satan
recommendations.overview: A group of young people leave a disco and bump into a shepherd who is ready to spend his night worshipping Satan.

recommendations.title: Flawless
recommendations.overview: A female executive and a night janitor conspire to commit a daring diamond heist from their mutual employer, The London Diamond Corporation.

recommendations.title: Slumdog Millionaire
recommendations.overview: A teenager reflects on his life after being accused of cheating on the Indian version of "Who Wants to be a Millionaire?".

recommendations.title: Sherlock: The Abominable Bride
recommendations.genres: Crime, Drama, Mystery, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson find themselves in 1890s London in this holiday special.

recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: An American family on holiday in Africa becomes lost in a game reserve and stalked by vicious killer lions.

recommendations.title: Wimbledon
recommendations.overview: Britain’s Peter Colt has never quite lived up to his dreams of tennis stardom. Once ranked as high as number 11 in the world, the journeyman veteran has watched his number slip to 119 as his confidence on the court slowly ebbs away.  Now, on the eve

recommendations.title: Eastern Promises
recommendations.overview: A Russian teenager living in London dies during childbirth but leaves clues in her diary that could tie her child to a rape involving a violent Russian mob family.
